# Provider x Vendor Map

Map between prodex providers and Multica vendors.

## In-Scope

| prodex Provider | Multica Vendor |
|---|---|
| OpenAI | Codex |
| AWS | Kiro |
| Google | Antigravity |
| Cline | Cline |
| OpenCode / Crush | Crush (migrated) |

## Out-of-Scope (7 Vendors)

The following 7 vendors are explicitly declared out-of-scope for this phase:

1. **Kimchi** (Removed from scope per ADR-001)
2. **Claude Code** (Not in project scope; Opus runs via Kiro/AWS)
3. **DeepSeek** (Not in vendors scope per master plan)
4. **AWS Bedrock** (Used as transport, not standalone vendor)
5. **GitHub Copilot** (Out of scope)
6. **Cursor** (Out of scope)
7. **Mistral** (Out of scope)
